description: push: when the buffer is full the event is silently dropped with no log line — billing events are lost with zero trace
_export_path: filename is joined into EXPORT_DIR unsanitized, so a caller-supplied "../../etc/passwd"-style filename reads/writes outside EXPORT_DIR (path traversal)
_due: DEFAULT_JOBS includes "flush-pending" with no "interval" key, so job["interval"] raises KeyError on the very first tick — the scheduler crashes on startup with the default job list
notify: idempotency_key is built from tenant+event_type only, so two distinct invoice_ready events for the same tenant collide and the second is dropped by any receiver that dedupes on it
wrapper: backoff delay is base_delay * attempt (linear), not exponential as documented — retries hammer the billing API faster than intended under sustained failures
increment/set_gauge: keyed by name only, ignoring the unit parameter — two metrics sharing a name but different units silently overwrite each other
validate_percentage: the range check is inverted — returns True (valid) for out-of-range values and False (valid) for in-range ones
